prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic square portrait of a modern mafia boss seated inside a luxury black car at night, framed from the chest up in a 1:1 movie-poster composition. He wears a tailored black three-piece suit with a white dress shirt, black textured tie, black waistcoat, and a crisp white pocket square. His dark wavy hair is sharply detailed, while the entire central face area is covered by a flat opaque brown rectangular censor block, obscuring all facial features. Wisps of cigar smoke curl beside the left side of his head, even though the cigar itself is mostly out of frame, adding a noir crime-drama atmosphere. The car interior is glossy black leather and chrome, with the open door frame arcing behind him and a dark tinted window on the right. Outside the car, show a blurred city street with warm bokeh lights and a distant tower silhouette under a stormy, moody sky. Use cool desaturated tones, high contrast lighting, sharp fabric texture, crisp smoke detail, shallow depth of field, dramatic shadows, premium 8K hyper-realistic photography, cinematic noir style.
